purpose: Create one outcome-blind, chronologically split shock cohort from untouched prospective v9 features, then replay exact-wire executable targets only for selected anchors without weakening the observed v1 cost hurdle or materializing unselected target rows.

source_basis.title: Binance USD-M Futures: How to manage a local order book correctly
source_basis.used_fact: A reconstructable book requires a bridged snapshot, continuous diff sequence, absolute quantities, and removal of zero-quantity levels.

source_basis.title: The Price Impact of Order Book Events
source_basis.used_fact: Short-horizon price changes are related to order-flow imbalance relative to available depth, while raw trade volume alone is noisier.

source_basis.title: Multi-Level Order-Flow Imbalance in a Limit Order Book
source_basis.used_fact: Deeper order-flow imbalance can improve out-of-sample fit, but correlated levels require regularization and out-of-sample evaluation.

source_basis.title: Deep Limit Order Book Forecasting
source_basis.used_fact: High forecasting scores do not establish actionable trading value; complete-transaction operational evaluation is required.

source_basis.title: Bridging the Reality Gap in Limit Order Book Simulation
source_basis.used_fact: Execution results are sensitive to event timing, latency, market impact, and post-trade reversion, so these assumptions must remain explicit and stressed.

source_basis.title: The Probability of Backtest Overfitting
source_basis.used_fact: Repeated strategy selection on backtests creates material selection bias, requiring frozen hypotheses and untouched chronological evaluation.

source_basis.title: DuckDB Python Client API
source_basis.used_fact: Registered NumPy or Arrow relations, explicit transactions, and checkpoints support bounded columnar publication without row-at-a-time insertion.

v1_diagnostic_response.reason_for_population_change: The all-anchor replay validated exact-wire mechanics but used approximately 2.79 GB of observed private process memory and wrote 382284 options for one hour before any outcome-blind shock cohort existed.
v1_diagnostic_response.reason_for_horizon_change: The observed one-hour gross maximum remained below 12 bps through 15 seconds. V2 retains 15 seconds as a short-horizon stress and preregisters 60-second and 300-second horizons on new data instead of reducing costs after observing outcomes.

study_day_contract.clock: UTC used only as a statistical split and resampling boundary
study_day_contract.selection_rule: Choose the earliest seven consecutive finalized UTC days at or after the search start for which every day passes the frozen corpus integrity and coverage gates; after an ineligible day, restart at the next UTC day.

outcome_blind_shock_cohort.source_rows: valid v4 causal feature anchors only
outcome_blind_shock_cohort.threshold_statistic: nearest-rank empirical 99th percentile of finite shock_ratio, using sorted ascending values and rank ceiling(0.99 times n)
outcome_blind_shock_cohort.effective_threshold: maximum of 3.0 and the symbol training threshold
outcome_blind_shock_cohort.refractory_algorithm: For each symbol, sort candidates by anchor_wall_ns then run_id then anchor_index; retain the first candidate and then retain a candidate only when at least 15 seconds follow the previously retained candidate, across run and role boundaries.

execution_and_cost_inheritance.charge_base: average of absolute entry and exit walked quote notionals
execution_and_cost_inheritance.funding_boundary_crossing_policy: ineligible until exact settlement cash-flow evidence exists
execution_and_cost_inheritance.interpretation: conservative observable quote-path counterfactual, not an exchange fill

bounded_persistence.target_publication_unit: one source run in one transaction

qualification_sequence: implement and focused-test cohort construction and audit without target access
implement and focused-test selected-anchor exact-wire target replay and audit
validate one bounded prospective v9 segment and the rotation journal
collect enough untouched segments for the first seven consecutive complete UTC days
build and independently audit every v4 feature grid
atomically freeze the feature-only chronological cohort
replay and independently audit v2 targets one source run at a time
run the frozen shallow viability evaluation once
